description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a dark gray exterior, featuring large rectangular windows and a clean, geometric design. The front of the house includes a driveway with two parked cars and a small landscaped area with trees and shrubs. The side and rear yards are paved with light gray tiles and include outdoor seating, a hot tub, and additional greenery. The windows are arranged in an asymmetrical pattern, with some grouped together and others spaced apart, contributing to the contemporary aesthetic. The main entryway is slightly recessed, marked by a simple door and a small overhang, with a short path leading from the driveway. The overall structure is boxy and minimalist, with a focus on functionality and open outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, boxy two-story house with a flat roof, dark gray exterior, large windows, and landscaped front and rear yards. The design is minimalist with asymmetrical window placement and a simple, recessed entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway with two cars, main entryway, and landscaped area with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the paved yard, outdoor seating, hot tub, and additional landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, large windows, paved patio, and outdoor furniture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the driveway, parked cars, and a small landscaped section.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Simple recessed entry with a single door, small overhang, and a short path from the driveway
